tracks.meaning: an aggressive action taken against an enemy, involving force or weapons
to physically assault or strike someone or something violently
a sudden onset of a medical or emotional condition, such as a panic attack or asthma attack
an offensive move or sequence in a game designed to score points or gain advantage
a criminal act of assault or aggression against a person
a critical or negative statement directed at someone's character, beliefs, or position
a deliberate attempt to compromise, damage, or gain unauthorized access to a computer system or network
the act by which a disease, infection, or pest harms or affects an organism or plant
a critical challenge or threat to a company's market position or business model
to begin doing something with vigor or enthusiasm
the manner in which a musician starts playing a note, particularly regarding sharpness or clarity
the sudden entrance of an actor or character onto the stage
